headings.text: See your buyers before your competitors do.

paragraphs.text: Every Lumivex module shares the same realtime intent graph — so a Slack ping, a CRM enrichment, and an audience export all speak the same language about the same buyer.
Watch a live tape of every buying signal across the open web — second-party data, review-site browsing, hiring spikes, and stack-change events — all scored against your ICP within 90 seconds.
Lumivex resolves every contact, subsidiary, and parent entity into a single relationship graph — so a buyer trail at a Tokyo subsidiary triggers the right rep on your enterprise team in New York.
Hot signals show up where your reps already live — a clean Slack alert with account context, suggested talking points, and a one-click sequence start. No tab-switching, no triage queue.
Two-way sync with Salesforce, HubSpot, and Attio writes intent scores, signal timelines, and account fit ratings directly to the records your reps already use. Zero new tabs.
Stack rules in plain English to spin up an audience in seconds — then export it to LinkedIn, Meta, or your outbound sequence. Audiences auto-refresh as new accounts trip your thresholds.
Spin up Lumivex in 48 hours. No long contracts, no implementation fee — just signals flowing to the people who close.
B2B signal intelligence for growth teams who refuse to wait for the hand-raise.

visibleText: Lumivex Ignite Platform Results Pricing Onboard Start Free Trial The Lumivex Platform Five Modules. One Signal Engine. Every Lumivex module shares the same realtime intent graph — so a Slack ping, a CRM enrichment, and an audience export all speak the same language about the same buyer. Start Free Trial Explore Modules Capabilities 01 · Intent Radar 02 · Account Graph 03 · Slack Pulse 04 · CRM Sync 05 · Audience Builder Module 01 Intent Radar Watch a live tape of every buying signal across the open web — second-party data, review-site browsing, hiring spikes, and stack-change events — all scored against your ICP within 90 seconds. ◆ 14,000+ tracked signals Daily ingest from 320 first-party and partner feeds, deduped on company domain. ◆ Custom signal weights Tune what 'high intent' means for your motion — from job-post velocity to G2 review reads. ◆ Sub-90-second freshness Streaming pipeline routes hot accounts to your reps before the trail goes cold. Streaming Scored ICP-aware Live Intent Feed Account Signal Score Corvin Labs Hiring · 4 SDRs 94 Nuvaro Health G2 review read 91 Stelka Ventures Stack: Segment 78 Halcyon Print Funding · Series B 72 Brindle Co Website visits ↑ 3.4× 68 Mossvale Tech change detected 61 Module 02 Account Graph Lumivex resolves every contact, subsidiary, and parent entity into a single relationship graph — so a buyer trail at a Tokyo subsidiary triggers the right rep on your enterprise team in New York. ◆ Multi-entity resolution Roll signals from subsidiaries up to the parent buying committee automatically. ◆ Contact-to-account linking Map persona-level engagement to the right account owner, no duplicates. ◆ Relationship strength score See which accounts share board members, investors, or executive alumni. Graph DB Entity Resolution Hierarchy Corvin Labs · Relationship Map Corvin Labs Corvin EU GmbH Corvin Cloud Inc. Halcyon Print (sister) M. Okafor · VP Eng Series C · 2024 Module 03 Slack Pulse Hot signals show up where your reps already live — a clean Slack alert with account context, suggested talking points, and a one-click sequence start. No tab-switching, no triage queue. ◆ Channel routing Send signals to the right pod, region, or vertical channel automatically. ◆ Threaded context Each alert opens a thread with enrichment, history, and last-touch data. ◆ Quiet-hours digest Bundle non-critical signals into a 7am morning brief for each rep. Realtime Slack-native Routing # growth-signals LV Lumivex 9:42 AM 🔥 Hot signal · Corvin Labs (94) · Posted 4 SDR roles in 48h. Owner: @dana . Suggested play: Hiring Velocity . LV Lumivex 9:38 AM Nuvaro Health read your G2 page (2nd visit this week). Cc @theo — last touch 14d ago. LV Lumivex 9:21 AM Stelka Ventures added Segment to their stack. Matches ICP rule “Modern data infra” . LV Lumivex 9:05 AM ⚡ Funding signal · Halcyon Print closed $42M Series B. Routed to @kira . Module 04 CRM Sync Two-way sync with Salesforce, HubSpot, and Attio writes intent scores, signal timelines, and account fit ratings directly to the records your reps already use. Zero new tabs. ◆ Field-level mapping Push any Lumivex signal to any custom field with conflict resolution rules. ◆ Realtime + nightly sync Hot signals push instantly; full account refreshes run nightly at 02:00 UTC. ◆ Audit trail Every write is logged and reversible from the Lumivex admin console. Salesforce HubSpot Attio 2-way Sync Status · Last 60s LV Lumivex 3,842 events SF Salesforce ✓ Healthy Field Direction Last Sync Intent Score → SFDC 2s ago ICP Fit Tier → SFDC 2s ago Last Signal → SFDC 4s ago Owner Assignment ← SFDC 11s ago Lifecycle Stage ← SFDC 11s ago Module 05 Audience Builder Stack rules in plain English to spin up an audience in seconds — then export it to LinkedIn, Meta, or your outbound sequence. Audiences auto-refresh as new accounts trip your thresholds. ◆ Composable rules Mix firmographics, intent signals, and CRM stage in nested AND / OR logic. ◆ Live counts Audience size updates the moment you adjust a rule — no preview button. ◆ One-click destinations Push to LinkedIn Matched Audiences, Meta CAPI, Outreach, or CSV. No-code Live-refresh Multi-destination Audience · "Q2 Mid-Market Hot" Intent score >= 75 in last 14d 2,184 AND Employees 200 – 2000 1,047 AND Industry = SaaS, Fintech 612 AND CRM stage != Closed-Won 589 AND NOT Open opp owner = self 441 441 Accounts · Auto-refresh hourly All five modules · One subscription See your buyers before your competitors do. Spin up Lumivex in 48 hours. No long contracts, no implementation fee — just signals flowing to the people who close. Start Free Trial See Pricing Lumivex B2B signal intelligence for growth teams who refuse to wait for the hand-raise.
